title: collomia gracilis
intro: Collomia gracilis, also known as slender collomia, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Collomia gracilis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Collomia gracilis can be made into a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
